title: 7 Retirement Stocks to Buy in Unexpected Sectors

title: Genuine Parts Company to Report Second Quarter 2022 Earnings on July 27, 2022
text: ATLANTA , June 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) plans to release Second Quarter Earnings on July 27, 2022. Management will also conduct a conference call on this date at 11:00 a.m.

title: 4 Stocks With Upgraded Broker Ratings to Consider Right Now
text: One must follow rating upgrades by brokers as they have a deeper understanding of the stocks. We choose PBF Energy (PBF), Genuine Parts (GPC), RingCentral (RNG) and Waters (WAT) as these witness ratings upgrades.
